- [ ] Structure stays deterministic; copy stays constrained
- [ ] Safe by default — no path can invent credentials/prices/claims
- [ ] JSON Schema (`input/business-brief.schema.json`) and the Zod schema are in sync (if the brief changed)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior or status changed)
